en: And looking intently at the council, Paul said, "Brothers, I have lived my life before God in all good conscience up to this day."
zh: 保羅定睛看著公議會的各人，說：“各位弟兄，我在 神面前，行事為人一向都是憑著良心的。”

en: And the high priest Ananias commanded those who stood by him to strike him on the mouth.
zh: 大祭司亞拿尼亞就吩咐站在他旁邊的人打保羅的嘴巴。

en: Then Paul said to him, "God is going to strike you, you whitewashed wall! Are you sitting to judge me according to the law, and yet contrary to the law you order me to be struck?"
zh: 保羅對他說：“你這粉飾的牆啊， 神要擊打你！你坐堂要按著律法審問我，現在你竟然違背律法吩咐人打我嗎？”

en: Those who stood by said, "Would you revile God's high priest?"
zh: 站在旁邊的人民說：“你敢辱罵 神的大祭司嗎？”

en: And Paul said, "I did not know, brothers, that he was the high priest, for it is written, 'You shall not speak evil of a ruler of your people.'"
zh: 保羅說：“弟兄們，我不知道他是大祭司。經上說：‘不可咒詛你人民的領袖。’”

en: Now when Paul perceived that one part were Sadducees and the other Pharisees, he cried out in the council, "Brothers, I am a Pharisee, a son of Pharisees. It is with respect to the hope and the resurrection of the dead that I am on trial."
zh: 保羅看出其中一部分是撒都該人，另一部分是法利賽人，就在公議會中大聲說：“我是法利賽人，也是法利賽人的子孫，我現在受審，是為了盼望死人復活！”

en: And when he had said this, a dissension arose between the Pharisees and the Sadducees, and the assembly was divided.
zh: 他說了這話，法利賽人和撒都該人就起了爭論，會眾也分裂了，成為兩派。

en: For the Sadducees say that there is no resurrection, nor angel, nor spirit, but the Pharisees acknowledge them all.
zh: 原來撒都該人說沒有復活，沒有天使，也沒有鬼靈，法利賽人卻認定這些都有。

en: Then a great clamor arose, and some of the scribes of the Pharisees' party stood up and contended sharply, "We find nothing wrong in this man. What if a spirit or an angel spoke to him?"
zh: 於是眾人大嚷大鬧，有幾個法利賽派的經學家站起來辯論說：“我們看不出這個人作過甚麼壞事；說不定有靈或天使對他說過話。”

en: And when the dissension became violent, the tribune, afraid that Paul would be torn to pieces by them, commanded the soldiers to go down and take him away from among them by force and bring him into the barracks.
zh: 爭論越來越大，千夫長怕保羅被他們撕碎了，就吩咐士兵下去，把他從人群中搶救出來，帶到營樓去。

en: The following night the Lord stood by him and said, "Take courage, for as you have testified to the facts about me in Jerusalem, so you must testify also in Rome."
zh: 當天晚上，主站在保羅身邊，說：“你要壯起膽來，你怎樣在耶路撒冷作見證，也必照樣在羅馬為我作見證。”

en: When it was day, the Jews made a plot and bound themselves by an oath neither to eat nor drink till they had killed Paul.
zh: 到了天亮，猶太人在一起祕密計謀，並且發誓說，不殺保羅，就不吃不喝。

en: There were more than forty who made this conspiracy.
zh: 一同策劃這項陰謀的有四十多人。

en: They went to the chief priests and elders and said, "We have strictly bound ourselves by an oath to taste no food till we have killed Paul.
zh: 他們來見眾祭司長和長老，說：“我們已經發了誓，不殺保羅，就不吃東西。

en: Now therefore you, along with the council, give notice to the tribune to bring him down to you, as though you were going to determine his case more exactly. And we are ready to kill him before he comes near."
zh: 現在你們和公議會要通知千夫長，帶保羅到你們這裡來，裝作要詳細審查他。我們已經預備好了，不等他走近，就把他殺了。”

en: Now the son of Paul's sister heard of their ambush, so he went and entered the barracks and told Paul.
zh: 但保羅的外甥聽見這項埋伏的詭計，就到營樓去，告訴保羅。

en: Paul called one of the centurions and said, "Take this young man to the tribune, for he has something to tell him."
zh: 保羅請了一個百夫長來，說：“請你帶這個青年人去見千夫長，他有事要報告。”

en: So he took him and brought him to the tribune and said, "Paul the prisoner called me and asked me to bring this young man to you, as he has something to say to you."
zh: 百夫長就帶保羅的外甥去見千夫長，說：“囚犯保羅請了我去，求我帶這個青年人來見你，他有事要向你報告。”

en: The tribune took him by the hand, and going aside asked him privately, "What is it that you have to tell me?"
zh: 千夫長拉著他的手，走到一邊，私下問他：“你有甚麼事要向我報告？”

en: And he said, "The Jews have agreed to ask you to bring Paul down to the council tomorrow, as though they were going to inquire somewhat more closely about him.
zh: 他說：“猶太人已經約好了，要求你明天把保羅帶到公議會裡去，裝作要詳細審查他。

en: But do not be persuaded by them, for more than forty of their men are lying in ambush for him, who have bound themselves by an oath neither to eat nor drink till they have killed him. And now they are ready, waiting for your consent."
zh: 你不要聽他們，因為他們有四十多人正在埋伏起來等著保羅；他們發了誓，不殺保羅，就不吃不喝。現在他們已經準備好了，只等你答應。”

en: So the tribune dismissed the young man, charging him, "Tell no one that you have informed me of these things."
zh: 千夫長囑咐那青年人：“不要告訴人你把這事告訴了我。”然後就打發他走了。

en: Then he called two of the centurions and said, "Get ready two hundred soldiers, with seventy horsemen and two hundred spearmen to go as far as Caesarea at the third hour of the night.
zh: 千夫長叫了兩個百夫長來，說：“預備兩百個步兵，七十個騎兵、兩百個長槍手，晚上九點鐘往該撒利亞去。

en: Also provide mounts for Paul to ride and bring him safely to Felix the governor."
zh: 也要預備好牲口，好讓保羅騎上，護送他安全到達腓力斯總督那裡。”

en: And he wrote a letter to this effect:
zh: 千夫長寫了一封信，大意如下：

en: "Claudius Lysias, to his Excellency the governor Felix, greetings.
zh: “革老丟．呂西亞問候總督腓力斯大人。

en: This man was seized by the Jews and was about to be killed by them when I came upon them with the soldiers and rescued him, having learned that he was a Roman citizen.
zh: 這個人被猶太人捉住，快要遭害的時候，我聽說他是羅馬公民，就帶兵去把他救出來。

en: And desiring to know the charge for which they were accusing him, I brought him down to their council.
zh: 為要知道猶太人控告他的原因，我就帶他到他們的公議會那裡去。

en: I found that he was being accused about questions of their law, but charged with nothing deserving death or imprisonment.
zh: 我發現他被控告，是為了他們律法上的問題，並沒有甚麼該死該綁的罪名。

en: And when it was disclosed to me that there would be a plot against the man, I sent him to you at once, ordering his accusers also to state before you what they have against him."
zh: 後來我接到密報，得知害他的陰謀，就立刻把他送到你那裡去，並且吩咐原告到你面前來控告他。”

en: So the soldiers, according to their instructions, took Paul and brought him by night to Antipatris.
zh: 於是士兵照著吩咐，把保羅提出來，連夜帶到安提帕底。

en: And on the next day they returned to the barracks, letting the horsemen go on with him.
zh: 第二天，他們把保羅交給騎兵隊護送，就回營樓去了。

en: When they had come to Caesarea and delivered the letter to the governor, they presented Paul also before him.
zh: 騎兵到了該撒利亞，把信呈上總督，同時把保羅也交給他。

en: On reading the letter, he asked what province he was from. And when he learned that he was from Cilicia,
zh: 總督讀了信，就問保羅是哪一省的人；知道了他是基利家人，

en: he said, "I will give you a hearing when your accusers arrive." And he commanded him to be guarded in Herod's praetorium.
zh: 就說：“等到原告也來了，我才審問你。”於是吩咐人把他拘留在希律的王府裡。
